fact: Honey never spoils; archaeologists found 3000-year-old edible honey.

flash_quiz.q: Insaan ki body mein sabse badi gland (granthi) kaun si hai?
Protein ka pachan (digestion) kahan se shuru hota hai?
Bile Juice (Pitta Ras) kahan store hota hai?
Small Intestine ka sabse lamba bhag kaun sa hai?
Danton (Teeth) ka sabse kathor (hardest) bhag kya kehlata hai?
